name: 叙事技巧
subject: english
domain_name: 读者-作者-文本 / Readers, Writers, Texts / Readers, Writers, Texts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to analyse and evaluate the function of narrative point of view, voice, focalization, and temporal structure in shaping meaning and reader response in prose fiction.
Students will be able to explain how authors use techniques such as characterization, dialogue, and plot development to construct narrative and convey thematic concerns.

interactive_resources.note: 制作课件时在 search_url 搜索对应练习，获取 embed 代码嵌入
